items.title: UPS Is Closing Package Facilities: See the List of Doomed Locations Across Several States in 2026
items.description: After announcing mass layoffs in January, the shipping giant has disclosed in a court filing almost two dozen facilities marked for closure.

items.description: The figure skater has captured the internet’s heart. Brands should be lining up.

items.title: Apple’s Emergency SOS Helped Save 6 Skiers After California’s Deadliest Avalanche—Here’s How to Use It Yourself
items.description: It allowed skiers to connect with rescuers via satellite.

items.title: New Research Says Rural Internet Service Could Be Holding Your Company  Back
items.description: In a digital world, even rural employees’ well-being is impacted by internet accessibility and quality.

items.title: Your Biggest Threat Is Obscurity
items.description: The existence of similar businesses won’t sink you. Being unknown will.
